title: DUP-ARQ-2
short description: DUP-ARQ-2 (also known as ARTRAC II) is a further development of the DUP-ARQ system and the system characteristics are very similar. DUP-ARQ-2 allows transmission of ITA-2 (Baudot) or ITA-5 (ASCII) characters depending on the application.
description: **DUP-ARQ-2** (also known as ARTRAC II) is a further development of the [DUP-ARQ](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/DUP-ARQ) system and the system characteristics are very similar. DUP-ARQ-2 allows transmission of ITA-2 (Baudot) or ITA-5 (ASCII) characters depending on the application. DUP-ARQ-2 is twice as fast as DUP-ARQ, running at 250 Bd. Norway was a major user of DUP-ARQ-2
